```yaml
title: "ECON216 Spring 2026 Group Project"
author: "Calais Michaelsson, Catherina Iltchev, Juliene Jones"
date: "03-26-2026"
output:
  pdf_document: default
  html_document: default
```
```{r}

```
```{r}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```
```{r}
library(tidycensus)
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
library(gtrendsR)
library(haven)
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)
library(tibble)
#census_api_key("14bd2fb7910d5d6d1719f85cf1bc8a8923de48b6", install = TRUE)
pew_data <- read_sav("W56_Oct19/W56_Oct19/ATP W56.sav")

heycupid_data <- read_csv("New_Datasets/okcupid_profiles.csv")
```
```{r}
glimpse(heycupid_data)
```
